name: Blueberry Dessert Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1 cup oats, and 6 tablespoons margarine. Mix at low speed until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 cup crumbs for topping. To the remaining crumbs, add the egg. Press into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
6. In the same large bowl, mix the remaining 1/4 cup oats, 2 tablespoons margarine, nuts, sugar, and cinnamon with the reserved crumbs.
7. Remove the base from the oven and spread the pie filling evenly over the top.
8. Sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture.
9. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until the crumbs are light golden brown.
10. Cool completely.
11. Cut into wedges or squares.
12. Makes 12 servings.
